page: Microsoft Azure M624s_12_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSHighMemoryv3 family, designed for workloads requiring massive memory capacities. It features 624 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 11,400.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 18.27 GB of memory per core.

This server does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. There are no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the massive scale of 624 dedicated vCPUs and 11.4 TB of memory, this instance represents a highly specialized hardware profile. It offers high resource density for enterprise-scale workloads, balancing extreme memory capacity with a high count of dedicated compute cores.

The M624s_12_v3 is engineered for large-scale in-memory databases, massive enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data warehousing workloads. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for network-attached storage performance, while the sheer volume of RAM and dedicated vCPUs makes it suitable for consolidating massive transactional databases or running large-scale memory-bound simulations.
description: Microsoft Azure M624s_12_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server in the MSHighMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 624 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 11,400.0 GB of RAM, yielding 18.27 GB of memory per core. This server does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, and it contains no GPUs. Designed for extreme memory-intensive workloads, this instance is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and massive data warehousing operations where high resource density and dedicated compute power are required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M624s_12_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 624 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 11,400 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for massive enterprise database workloads.

tagline: An ultra-high-memory instance featuring dedicated compute cores and massive RAM capacity for enterprise-scale in-memory database workloads.
